narrative:
Precinct Mechanicsburg (precinct in Champaign County) has 953 registered voters, with 59.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.8 percentage points.
